scripts.sigil:compile: cargo build --quiet --manifest-path ../../language/compiler/Cargo.toml -p sigil-cli && ../../language/compiler/target/debug/sigil compile src/game2048.lib.sigil -o web/src/generated/game-2048.ts && mkdir -p web/src/generated/core && cp .local/core/prelude.ts web/src/generated/core/prelude.ts
